description_long: This handbag features a rectangular envelope-style design with a prominent flap closure. The exterior is adorned with a geometric woven pattern in shades of olive green and dark green, creating a visually striking contrast. The flap is outlined with a subtle brown trim, adding a touch of detail to the otherwise minimalist silhouette. The bag appears to be made from a woven textile material, likely straw or synthetic fiber, giving it a semi-soft yet structured form. The back of the handbag continues the geometric pattern without interruption, and the sides are slim, indicating a compact, clutch-like profile. There are no visible handles or straps, emphasizing its use as a hand-carried accessory.
description: A rectangular envelope-style handbag with a green geometric woven pattern and a brown-trimmed flap closure, designed for hand-carrying.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flap closure with brown trim and the full geometric pattern.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, flat profile and the edge of the flap.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the uninterrupted geometric pattern across the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and the woven texture.
attribute_strap_type: none; this handbag does not have any visible straps or handles.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure; the flap folds over the front and is likely secured by a hidden magnetic snap or button underneath.
attribute_pattern: Geometric woven pattern in olive and dark green.
